tasks.title: GATE.T52.NARR.CONTENT_EXTRACT.001: Extract all dialogue to JSON content files
tasks.intent: Extract all hardcoded dialogue from TutorialContentV0.cs and FirstOfficerContentV0.cs into JSON data files. Content classes load from JSON at init. Zero narrative text in System or Bridge code. JSON format: array of {trigger, candidate, sequence, tier, text, relationship_delta}. Write a dialogue_schema.md documenting all fields, valid values, and editing instructions for non-programmers.
constraints: All dialogue text in JSON content files only -- zero narrative in System or Bridge code.
JSON must be human-readable and easily editable.
Include dialogue_schema.md with field definitions, valid enum values, examples, and editing instructions.
